title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Kamalar Banabas
desc: Banished from the kingdom under false pretences, Kamala endures hardship while raising her son, determined to clear her name and reunite with her loved ones.

title: Mejo Bou
desc: Barun's father forces him to marry Sampa, a colleague from a middle-class background. After the marriage, Barun creates problems for his new wife and damages her reputation.

title: Satru Mitra
desc: A happy family goes through various trials and tribulations and falls apart when greed takes precedence over relationships.

title: Annaye Atyachar
desc: An inebriated Udayan spends a night with his friend's daughter, Kunti, mistaking her to be his wife. He leaves unaware the next morning, setting off a chain of chaotic events.

title: Loafer
desc: Bikram is a selfless man who is unfairly hated by his family. However, after an arrest for helping a friend marry, he struggles to gain the respect of those he constantly protects.
